capabilities.name: frontend-builder
capabilities.description: Spawns the Frontend Developer subagent to implement UI features, refactor components, and integrate REST/GraphQL APIs.

capabilities.name: ui-designer
capabilities.description: Spawns the UI Designer subagent to establish visual layout, align styles with the design system, and polish typography/color palettes.

capabilities.name: ux-auditor
capabilities.description: Spawns the UX Architect subagent to analyze user journeys, wireframe navigation structures, and optimize task completion flows.

capabilities.name: accessibility-checker
capabilities.description: Spawns the Accessibility Auditor subagent to perform WCAG 2.1 compliance scans, verify screen reader accessibility, and audit ARIA markup.

capabilities.name: performance-benchmarker
capabilities.description: Spawns the Performance Benchmarker subagent to run detailed Web Vitals profiling, measure bundle size issues, and identify render-blocking resources.

capabilities.name: delight-injector
capabilities.description: Spawns the Whimsy Injector subagent to integrate micro-animations, GSAP-driven transitions, sound effects, and interactive Easter eggs.

capabilities.name: rapid-prototyper
capabilities.description: Spawns the Rapid Prototyper subagent to quickly scaffold frontend boilerplates using Vite, React, Tailwind CSS, or vanilla environments.
